meaning: n.[商标名]赛拉尼斯(一种醋脂纤维,俗称人造丝)
examples: Celanese (China) Holding Co., Ltd was established in 2004, located in Pudong district, Shanghai.
Celanese has nearly 90 years of history as a manufacturer of intermediate and downstream chemical products.
Celanese Corp. opened a plant this year that USES coal-based feedstock to make a chemical used in paints and food sweeteners.
But so far no company has attempted the process on the scale that Celanese plans.
Celanese Chief Executive David Weidman said last week that the process would make ethanol cheaper than using corn.
